summary: Outbound transfers started failing after a verifier hotfix, while two suspicious withdrawals were flagged by monitoring.
userImpact: Bridge withdrawals are paused and some pending transfers may be delayed for several hours
likelyRootCause: A verifier contract update appears to have accepted malformed signatures under a narrow edge case
symptoms: validator mismatch alerts triggered on the bridge relayer
two outbound withdrawals do not match expected signer quorum
support tickets report missing bridge completions on Base
